code.name: MCNP
code.notes: Results contributed by Hrvoje Brkic. F4 tally = track-length flux estimate; F6 tally = dose. LET values derived from stopping power via a separate spreadsheet (LET_Calculation.ods).

capabilities.notes: Same scope as plan01: proton-only LET, depth dose/fluence, and target scalars. No water profiles, no spectra, no Qeff.

outputs.description: Depth LET profiles in silicon (Z_narrow) – DLET and TLET for all protons
outputs.notes: Page numbering intentionally matches SHIELD-HIT12A convention (p3=DLET protons, p6=TLET protons).

outputs.description: Depth fluence profile in silicon (Z_narrow) – F4 tally, primary particles
outputs.notes: File named with 'dose' prefix but contains F4 flux of primary particles.

outputs.description: Depth dose profile in silicon (Z_narrow) – F6 tally (dose, MeV/g/SP)
Target volume – fluence (F4) and dose (F6) scalars
